vision: The world's first AI-native operating system for the creator economy.

roadmap.title: AI Content Engine (V1)
roadmap.description: Integration with Gemini 3.1 Pro for multi-modal content generation including hooks, scripts, and captions.

roadmap.title: Visual Studio (Firefly Integration)
roadmap.description: Direct integration with Adobe Firefly and Canva API for automated graphic generation based on brand kit.

roadmap.title: Video Lab (AI Synthesis)
roadmap.description: AI-powered video editing modules for auto-captioning, B-roll generation, and AI voiceovers using Veo and ElevenLabs.

roadmap.title: Multi-Platform Scheduler
roadmap.description: Unified dashboard to schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and X.

roadmap.title: Creator Analytics Pro
roadmap.description: Deep-dive analytics with AI insights on audience sentiment and best posting times.

roadmap.title: Brand Outreach CRM
roadmap.description: Automated brand deal tracking and AI-crafted pitch generation with integrated email tracking.

system_architecture.frontend: Next.js 15 (App Router), Tailwind v4, Framer Motion

monetization_strategy: AI Credit Top-ups (Pay-as-you-go for high-res video)

go_to_market.mvp_launch: Focus on AI Hook Gen + Media Kits for Instagram Creators.
go_to_market.scaling: Partner with Creator Agencies and implement a referral loop (Free credits for invites).
go_to_market.retention: Weekly AI-generated trend reports and community challenges.
